title: Unity C# and Shader Tutorials
creator: Jasper Flick
description: A long-running set of carefully sequenced Unity tutorials covering procedural meshes, rendering, movement, physics, data, and editor tooling. Older series target older Unity releases and are clearly labeled.
useful: Projects explain the code and mathematics in depth instead of asking readers to copy an unexplained final result.
audience: Unity developers who know basic C# and want deeper graphics, mathematics, and systems practice.
learning: Build procedural and graphical systems step by step
Translate mathematics into Unity C# and shaders
Judge whether a tutorial matches the installed Unity version
